since_last: 65% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.46%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.13% · BTC +2.44% · Gold +2.34% · Nasdaq100 +0.86%. 65% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.46%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.46%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.95%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -24.44%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +9.75%, LRCX +5.34%, TER +5.31%, DELL +5.24%, AMD +5.02%. Laggards: IBM -24.44%, NOW -6.75%, WDAY -5.95%, ARM -5.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.75% at $141.57
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.75% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
